invalidation_report.notes: All thesis invalidation conditions are clear.

primary_risks: As of March 31, 2026, we have entered into leases primarily related to data centers that have not yet commenced with future lease payments of $75.6 billion. These leases will commence between 2026 and 2031 with non-cancelable lease terms primarily between one and 25 years.

As of March 31, 2026, we had material purchase commitments and other contractual obligations totaling $332.4 billion, of which $138.0 billion was short-term. These purchase commitments primarily relate to costs for technical infrastructure and inventory through long-term supply agreements and open purchase orders.

As of March 31, 2026, we had short-term accrued legal and regulatory fines and settlements of $15.6 billion. This amount primarily included EC fines, in addition to accruals related to other legal matters and regulatory fines and settlements.
evidence_score_note: 6 directional items; bull weight 1.90 vs bear 3.80 → net -33.3
